summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Kebab Hut La Rochelle restaurant website. All core features working correctly including responsive design, navigation, menu display, and phone integration.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with correct colors (orange #FF6B00, yellow #FFD700, black #1A1A1A)
Navigation bar with logo and action buttons (Appeler, Itinéraire) working correctly
Commander button correctly links to tel:+33983510117
Itinéraire button correctly links to Google Maps with La Rochelle address
All 6 category navigation buttons (Kebabs, Burgers, Tacos, Bowls, Frites, Boissons) present and functional
25 menu items display correctly with images, names, prices, and descriptions
5 popular items correctly marked with 'Populaire' badge
Info section displays address, phone, and schedule correctly
Current day (Mercredi) highlighted in orange color in schedule
Mobile responsive design working perfectly
Mobile menu toggle opens/closes correctly
Floating CTA button visible and functional on mobile
Category navigation scrollable on mobile devices
All phone links (tel:+33983510117) working in header, hero, info, and mobile sections
Google Maps links working for directions
Scroll to menu functionality working when clicking 'Voir le Menu'
Price formatting correct (French format with comma and €)
Footer with social media links present
Images loading successfully
Color scheme correctly implemented (orange, yellow, black, white)
